faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Pelham Bay?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Pelham Bay typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, the severity of the infestation, and the treatment method used. We offer free inspections and quotes to provide you with an accurate estimate based on your specific situation.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Pelham Bay homes?
faqs.answer: Treatment duration varies by method and property size. Heat treatment can often be completed in one day (6-8 hours), while chemical treatments may require 2-3 visits spaced several weeks apart to eliminate all life stages of bed bugs. Our technicians will provide a detailed timeline during your inspection.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe when applied by our licensed professionals. For heat treatments, no chemicals are used at all. For chemical applications, we provide clear instructions on any temporary precautions needed, and your home is safe to re-enter according to our guidelines, typically within a few hours.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatment in Pelham Bay?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We stand behind our work with a comprehensive warranty. If bed bugs return within the guarantee period (typically 30-90 days depending on the treatment plan), we'll re-treat your home at no additional charge. We also provide follow-up inspections to ensure complete elimination.
